stemHtml: Which of the following statements about long-term memory is correct?

options.a: Long-term memory stores knowledge on a temporary basis.
options.b: Information is stored in the Semantic, Episodic, and Procedural memories.
options.c: Long-term memory processes information quickly and has an effective mode of access in real time.
options.d: The period of time for which information is retained is limited by the frequency with which this same information is used.
